> Folding Proteins Is Simpler Than You ThinkThen why do we need customized LLM models, two of which seemed to require the resources of 2 of the wealthiest companies on earth (this and google's alphafold) to do it?
Did you just assume what I think about protein folding simplicity?!
Why is apple doing protein folding?
Prowlly cuz Siri didn’t work out
